column1: # REQUIRED columns (must be present):
#   name      Full company name           e.g.  Taiwan Semiconductor
#   ticker    Stock ticker symbol         e.g.  TSM
#   sector    Industry sector             e.g.  Semiconductors
#             Accepted values (or anything that fuzzy-maps to them):
#               Semiconductors
#               Retail
# OPTIONAL columns (leave blank or omit entirely — defaults to 0):
#   revenue_bn              Annual revenue in $B           e.g. 69.3  or  69.3B  or  69300M
#   margin                  Net profit margin              e.g. 0.385  or  38.5  or  38.5%
#   debt_ratio              Total debt / equity            e.g. 0.31   (raw ratio
#   yoy_growth              YoY revenue growth             e.g. 0.259  or  25.9  or  25.9%
#   market_cap_bn           Market cap in $B               e.g. 520.0
#   r_and_d_pct             R&D spend as % of revenue      e.g. 0.085  or  8.5   or  8.5%
#   capex_pct               CapEx as % of revenue          e.g. 0.121  or  12.1  or  12.1%
#   sector_growth_forecast  Analyst sector growth forecast e.g. 0.50   or  50    or  50%
#   forecast_horizon_months Forecast horizon in months     e.g. 12
# Notes:
#   • Percentage columns accept  0.385  OR  38.5  OR  38.5%  — all mean 38.5%
#   • Revenue/market_cap accept  69.3  OR  69.3B  OR  69300M  OR  0.0693T
#   • If sector_growth_forecast is set
column2: the shock propagation uses this as the
